name: Cherry-Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Can Sweetened condensed milk - Borden Eagle Brand
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cream cheese, vanilla, lemon juice, and sweetened condensed milk well until there are no lumps.
2. Pour half of the mixture into each pie crust. Refrigerate for 1 hour until firm.
3. Fill the top halves of the pie crusts with cherries. Refrigerate for another 1 hour.
4. Serve cold.
